title: Crystal Opacity
description:
Allows you to change how see through a crystal is with lots of settings.
or how transparent they are
body:
**Crystal Opacity**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Let's you make crystals transparent or see through with a opacity slider and then a per part toggle for opacity so theres - Core opacity slider - Inner glass opacity slider - Outer glass opacity slider - Extra glass opacity slider Requires - Silicon: [Silicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/silicons) - Mod Menu: [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - YACL: [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) ---
**What it looks like** ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MYNcCAe5/images/875efa930757dfefdd288b0e48fa78c592519327_350.webp)
--- **1.18.4 - 1.17.3 fabric loader** [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
